title: Add periodic sweep for cross-repo detection
description: Safety net sweep running CrossRepoSkill across all open jacks in all registered repos. Add sw sweep command + cron setup docs in README.
close_reason: sw sweep command + README cron docs + dry-run flag

title: LLM inference path: refine and test claude --print prompt
description: CrossRepoSkill LOW confidence path calls claude --print subprocess. Needs: real-world testing, prompt refinement, per-jack caching to avoid redundant calls, robust JSON extraction, graceful model error handling, --no-llm flag on sw create.
close_reason: per-jack LLM caching, robust JSON extraction, BEADS_NO_LLM env var, improved prompt, timeout logging

title: Learning loop: decision notes + pattern surfacing in sw done/resume
description: sw done --decision/-D flag for indexing key insights. sw resume surfaces 2-3 similar past jacks with their decision notes. Implemented in commit 0e89149.
